name_en: OHANEL 🚩🚩🚩 Denim 25C Lunch Box Bag. Exquisite and small chain clutch 👜. Denim with large logo hardware, antique silver handle and small logo. A curved line of stitching on the leather surface makes the whole bag look more upright! The chain is detachable and can also be carried by hand. The capacity is also suitable. Unique design and practicality have become my recent favorite. Size 17-19.5-5
